name: Grab Pack Playtime Game
description: Grab Pack Playtime is a funny educational online game with the background of grabbing props. You will play a superhero in the game, explore a toy factory full of monsters, and collect various items in the toy factory with the help of two extra-long arms. Facing every challenge in the game, you have to come up with a different way. You have to fully display your wisdom and avoid it flexibly. Have a try!
tags: 3D, Adventure, Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fun, Funny, HTML5, Kids, Obstacle, Online, Puzzle, Skill
